case_title: EDGARDO SANCHEZ et al VS. RAFIQUE MOHAMMED

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,012.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, EDGARDO CHILEL, BIGLER AS TO DEFENDANT MOHAMMED, RAFIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUL-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOHAMMED, RAFIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-31-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MARIA ZAMUDIO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-07-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1900.00 BY THE PROGRESS REPORT DATE. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED EITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
